name: Crab Avocado Melt
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the crabmeat, mayonnaise, chopped green onion, and chopped parsley.
2. Spread half of the mixture evenly on each slice of pumpernickel bread.
3. Place a slice of avocado on top of the spread.
4. Add two slices of Colby or American cheese on top of the avocado.
5. Close the sandwich by placing one more slice of pumpernickle bread on top.
6. Place the sandwiches in a microwave-safe dish.
7. Microwave at 50% power for 1.5 to 3 minutes, or until heated through and the cheese has melted.
8. Repeat steps 4-7 for the second sandwich.
